        "scope_four_avoided_emissions_questions": [
            {
                "sfae_id": "01KF2TEVE9JNN9V625BPGZAA8A",
                "sgiq_id": "01KF2TEV45JN8KKHJ5XAX927AS",
                "update_date": "2026-01-16T07:14:02.535151+00:00",
                "created_date": "2026-01-16T07:14:02.535151+00:00",
                "renewable_energy_carbon_offset_projects_implemented": "Our company has implemented and invested in initiatives aimed at reducing carbon emissions and supporting climate-positive outcomes. These include the adoption of renewable energy solutions such as on-site solar installations and the procurement of renewable electricity where available.Additionally, we support environmental initiatives such as tree plantation programs and verified carbon offset projects to compensate for residual emissions. These efforts align with our long-term sustainability goals and demonstrate our commitment to reducing our environmental footprint.",
                "products_or_services_that_help_reduce_customer_emissions": "Our company develops and delivers products and services designed to improve operational efficiency and reduce resource consumption for our customers. By optimizing processes, reducing energy usage, and minimizing material waste, our solutions help customers lower their overall greenhouse gas emissions.Based on internal assessments and customer usage data, the use of our products can contribute to measurable reductions in electricity consumption and fuel usage, which in turn leads to avoided emissions. While precise emissions avoidance varies by customer and use case, preliminary estimates indicate a potential reduction of emissions in the range of 5–15% compared to conventional alternatives.",
                "circular_economy_practices_reuse_take_back_epr_refurbishment": "We actively incorporate circular economy principles into our business operations through recycling, reuse, and waste reduction initiatives. These include responsible disposal of electronic and packaging waste, reuse of materials where feasible, and collaboration with authorized recyclers.In addition, we support practices such as product refurbishment, extended product lifecycles, and compliance with applicable Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) regulations. These measures help reduce raw material consumption and landfill waste, contributing to lower indirect emissions across the value chain."
            }
        ]
    }
}

By optimizing processes, reducing energy usage, and minimizing material waste, our solutions help customers lower their overall greenhouse gas emissions.Based on internal assessments and customer usage data, the use of our products can contribute to measurable reductions in electricity consumption and fuel usage, which in turn leads to avoided emissions. While precise emissions avoidance varies by customer and use case, preliminary estimates indicate a potential reduction of emissions in the range of 5–15% compared to conventional alternatives.",
        "circular_economy_practices_reuse_take_back_epr_refurbishment": "We actively incorporate circular economy principles into our business operations through recycling, reuse, and waste reduction initiatives. These include responsible disposal of electronic and packaging waste, reuse of materials where feasible, and collaboration with authorized recyclers.In addition, we support practices such as product refurbishment, extended product lifecycles, and compliance with applicable Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) regulations. These measures help reduce raw material consumption and landfill waste, contributing to lower indirect emissions across the value chain.",
        "renewable_energy_carbon_offset_projects_implemented": "Our company has implemented and invested in initiatives aimed at reducing carbon emissions and supporting climate-positive outcomes. These include the adoption of renewable energy solutions such as on-site solar installations and the procurement of renewable electricity where available.Additionally, we support environmental initiatives such as tree plantation programs and verified carbon offset projects to compensate for residual emissions. These efforts align with our long-term sustainability goals and demonstrate our commitment to reducing our environmental footprint."

By optimizing processes, reducing energy usage, and minimizing material waste, our solutions help customers lower their overall greenhouse gas emissions.Based on internal assessments and customer usage data, the use of our products can contribute to measurable reductions in electricity consumption and fuel usage, which in turn leads to avoided emissions. While precise emissions avoidance varies by customer and use case, preliminary estimates indicate a potential reduction of emissions in the range of 5–15% compared to conventional alternatives.",
        "circular_economy_practices_reuse_take_back_epr_refurbishment": "We actively incorporate circular economy principles into our business operations through recycling, reuse, and waste reduction initiatives. These include responsible disposal of electronic and packaging waste, reuse of materials where feasible, and collaboration with authorized recyclers.In addition, we support practices such as product refurbishment, extended product lifecycles, and compliance with applicable Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) regulations. These measures help reduce raw material consumption and landfill waste, contributing to lower indirect emissions across the value chain.",
        "renewable_energy_carbon_offset_projects_implemented": "Our company has implemented and invested in initiatives aimed at reducing carbon emissions and supporting climate-positive outcomes. These include the adoption of renewable energy solutions such as on-site solar installations and the procurement of renewable electricity where available.Additionally, we support environmental initiatives such as tree plantation programs and verified carbon offset projects to compensate for residual emissions. These efforts align with our long-term sustainability goals and demonstrate our commitment to reducing our environmental footprint."
